summary: Iteration 87: Backend tests for 3 bug fixes - ALL 11 TESTS PASSED. Verified: (1) GET /api/auth/me returns 'name' field (not 'full_name') for drawer display, (2) Draft slot conflict bypass works - user can create procedure on same slot as their own draft, (3) Another user trying same slot gets 409 Conflict, (4) Deleted drafts are removed from DB and don't appear in GET /api/procedures, (5) Procedures sorted by created_at descending (latest first).
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/auth/me correctly returns 'name' field (line 662-670 in server.py) - UserResponse model uses 'name' not 'full_name'
Slot conflict bypass logic (line 1000-1014) correctly checks if existing procedure is user's own draft before blocking
DELETE /api/procedures/{id} (line 1287) correctly removes procedure from MongoDB
GET /api/procedures (line 1191) correctly sorts by created_at descending: .sort('created_at', -1)
seed_data_creation: Test procedures created and cleaned up during tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 87 verified 3 bug fixes: (1) Drawer username - GET /api/auth/me returns 'name' field, (2) Draft slot conflict bypass - continuing own draft bypasses slot check, another user gets 409, deleted drafts removed from DB, (3) Procedures sorted newest first. All backend APIs working correctly.

bug_1_drawer_username.description: Drawer menu should show username next to profile photo
bug_1_drawer_username.fix: Frontend changed from user?.full_name to user?.name
bug_1_drawer_username.backend_verification: PASS - GET /api/auth/me returns 'name' field for all roles (student, supervisor, incharge)

bug_2_draft_slot_conflict.description: Continuing a draft shows 'slot already booked' error
bug_2_draft_slot_conflict.fix: create_procedure now checks if existing slot is user's own draft and bypasses conflict
bug_2_draft_slot_conflict.backend_verification: PASS - InCharge and Student can create on same slot as their own draft

bug_2b_another_user_slot_conflict.description: Another user trying same slot should fail
bug_2b_another_user_slot_conflict.fix: Slot conflict check still blocks other users
bug_2b_another_user_slot_conflict.backend_verification: PASS - Student gets 409 Conflict when trying InCharge's slot

bug_2c_deleted_drafts.description: Deleted drafts still show in drafts list
bug_2c_deleted_drafts.backend_verification: PASS - Deleted drafts don't appear in GET /api/procedures, GET by ID returns 404

bug_3_sort_order.description: My Cases should show latest cases first
bug_3_sort_order.fix: GET /api/procedures now sorts by created_at descending
bug_3_sort_order.backend_verification: PASS - Procedures returned newest first, works with status filters
